_meta.threshold_rationale: ±0.03 typical 20-fixture LLM variance; 0.05 catches true regressions without false-positive noise. See [[feedback-529-contamination-awareness]] for variance bands.

suites.name: phone_60
suites.note: 60-fixture scaled suite (clean GT, post-Phase-I) — composite dropped from 0.9567 (buggy-GT v1) to 0.9179 due to (a) scale_fixtures.py duplicate bug fix exposing real numbers, (b) Phase I llmHint + Pass 12 verifier correctly flipping institution signs (clinics, schools) from `phone` to `service_institution`. 8 fixtures < 0.85 in v3 (vs 0 in v1). Decision PENDING: reclassify institution fixtures to service_institution_60 to fix.

suites.name: pii20_60
suites.note: 20-fixture suite (corpus-limited — clean GT; previous v1 baseline 0.9675 was on 35-fixture file with 15 duplicates from auto-scaling). Phase I regression Δ -0.0319 vs pii_20 0.9788: real_estate_rental + recruit_hiring fixtures that should be reclassified as service_institution.

suites.name: direction_arrow_60
suites.note: 20-fixture suite (corpus-limited — clean GT; previous v1 baseline 0.9337 was on 54-fixture file with 34 duplicates). Phase I Δ +0.0357 vs buggy-GT v1 (different error profile this run, no regression).

suites.name: service_institution_60
suites.note: 60-fixture Phase I suite — 13th intent, OBSERVE family, targets 514-imgs service_institution cluster. 5 categories (medical 21 / education 20 / government_admin 11 / financial 5 / government_law 3). 1 API error (image_6117 HTTP 500 sensitive-image); 59-fixture clean composite = 0.9608; full 60-fixture = 0.9508 (Δ -0.010). Threshold band [0.90, 1.00].
